summary: A superb audience recording that captures the board‑like clarity of a 1988 Greek show, highlighted by an impassioned Jerry on “Believe It Or Not,” a stellar “Candyman,” and an energetic second set.
review: The recording is an audience capture that rivals soundboard fidelity, delivering crisp stereo imaging and very little noise. The performance is high‑energy with Jerry’s pleading vocal on “Believe It Or Not” and a standout “Candyman,” while the second set rolls through Box of Rain, Victim Or The Crime, Watchtower and other classics with gusto. Minor issues are limited to mislabeled track names, but they do not detract from the overall listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: All ten reviews rate the show 4‑5 stars, praising both the energetic 1988 performance and the board‑like audience recording; only a few note mislabeled files, which are minor.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Board‑like clarity with sweet stereo/3‑D sound, very little distortion or background noise; occasional mislabelled track names but no audible flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The first set builds nicely and the second set is a powerhouse, with seamless transitions through Box of Rain, Victim, Watchtower and a high‑octane encore; pacing stays tight and energetic throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His vocal on “Believe It Or Not” is pleading and impassioned; guitar work on “Candyman” earns extended applause.
band_member_comments.Drums: The drum segment in the second‑set segue (Drums > Space) is highlighted as part of an awesome flow.
